hero.section: relative py-20 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#f0f9ff] to-white
hero.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1]
hero.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6

forms.title: text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-8 text-center
forms.card: p-6 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

firstVisit.title: text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-12 text-center
firstVisit.stepNumber: absolute -left-4 top-0 w-8 h-8 bg-[#0a91b1] text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold

insurance.title: text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6 text-center
insurance.description: text-xl text-gray-600 text-center mb-12 max-w-3xl mx-auto

cta.title: text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-6
cta.primaryButton: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3 bg-white text-[#0a91b1] font-semibold rounded-full hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors
cta.secondaryButton: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3 bg-transparent text-white font-semibold rounded-full border-2 border-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
